fields.label: Default Timezone
fields.description: Default timezone for booking schedule display (e.g., Europe/Berlin)

fields.label: Confirmation Mode
fields.description: Default booking confirmation mode for new resources

fields.label: Invoice Prefix
fields.description: Prefix for booking invoice numbers (e.g., BK-A1B2C3D4)

fields.label: Booking Form Page Slug
fields.description: CMS page slug for the booking form (used by Book Now button)

fields.label: Payment Capture Mode
fields.description: Manual: holds funds on card, admin charges later. Auto: charges immediately on checkout.

fields.label: Max Advance Booking (days)
fields.description: Maximum number of days in advance a user can book

fields.label: Min Lead Time (hours)
fields.description: Minimum hours before a slot starts that booking is allowed

fields.label: Cancellation Grace Period (hours)
fields.description: Hours before booking start when free cancellation is allowed

fields.label: Max Bookings per User per Day
fields.description: Maximum bookings a single user can make per day

fields.label: Default Slot Duration (minutes)
fields.description: Default slot duration in minutes for new resources

fields.label: Default Buffer (minutes)
fields.description: Default buffer time between consecutive slots

fields.label: Enable Recurring Bookings
fields.description: Allow users to create recurring bookings
